sentences.english: The leaves change color and the air becomes cool and crisp.
sentences.korean: 나뭇잎이 색이 변하고 공기가 시원하고 상쾌해져요.

sentences.english: I love wearing sweaters and scarves, and drinking hot coffee while walking through the park.
sentences.korean: 스웨터와 스카프를 입고 공원을 걸으면서 뜨거운 커피 마시는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: The food in autumn is also amazing — roasted chestnuts, pumpkin soup, and apple pie.
sentences.korean: 가을 음식도 놀라워요 — 군밤 호박 수프 사과 파이요.

sentences.english: The only thing I don't like about autumn is that it means winter is coming soon.
sentences.korean: 가을에서 유일하게 싫은 점은 곧 겨울이 온다는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Philosophy of Science — The Demarcation Problem
